cases.description: current page questions should trigger a live browser read, not a conversational guess

Checking the current page now...
_____javascript
return {
  url: location.href,

  origin: location.origin
}

cases.description: casual conversation should answer normally without execution
cases.response: Hi!

cases.description: live time should trigger execution instead of a blocker or narration
underspecified weather should use current context rather than bounce a location question to the human
self-referential follow-up should trigger execution, not another blocker or impossibility report
after an indirect current-context attempt fails, the agent should switch to direct browser location and continue through the weather step
geolocation coordinates are prerequisite data, not the final answer when the user asked for weather
if a place lookup happens inside a weather task, the agent should continue to weather instead of stopping on place identity
once the weather data is already present in telemetry, the agent should answer instead of executing again
cases.response: Prague is sunny and 12°C, feels like 10°C. Humidity is 30% and wind is 25 km/h.

cases.description: after weather was fetched for known coordinates and the user asks where that is precisely, the agent should reverse geocode instead of answering vaguely
collapsed payloads should trigger another extraction attempt instead of a stop or offer
user detail is prerequisite state for a write task and should lead into fileWrite, not a terminal identity answer
after reading a config file for an edit task, the agent should write the edit instead of summarizing the file
a selective text-file edit request should read the file first instead of jumping straight to a write
a selective yaml edit request should read the file first instead of inventing a blind write
a selective widget repair request should read the widget first instead of patching blind
failures: execution separator must appear exactly once on its own line

cases.description: after framework rejects a combined widget read-and-patch turn, recovery should be a pure read turn
after a current-space helper fails, the agent should switch helper families instead of retrying the same bad path
cases.response:
Checking your available spaces through the browser API...
_____javascript
return {
  hasSpace: !!globalThis.space,
  keys: globalThis.space ? Object.keys(globalThis.space) : null,
  currentKeys: globalThis.space?.current ? Object.keys(globalThis.space.current) : null,
  spacesKeys: globalThis.space?.spaces ? Object.keys(globalThis.space.spaces) : null
}

cases.description: reading a space metadata file is not the same as actually navigating there
cases.response:
Opening the Prostějov Weather space now...
_____javascript
location.href = "/app/L2/pan/spaces/space-1/"

cases.description: after the user says take me there, the agent should call the open-space helper instead of rereading metadata
after wrongly claiming the space cannot be opened, the agent should switch to the real open-space helper when the user pushes back
after a known file write error, recovery should stay on the exact file target instead of broad discovery or fake success
a follow-up edit request should produce one well-formed execution reply, not a staging sentence with a malformed separator
after a successful patch that satisfies the request, the agent should stop executing and answer once
after a retry succeeds, the agent should stop and answer rather than narrate readiness for more work
if the assistant previously sent staging-only prose and the user says do it, the next reply must execute instead of narrating again
after a successful patch and a concrete user complaint, the agent must execute a fix instead of falling into staging-only repetition
after staging-only hesitation and a user reminder about the execution gate, the next reply must be one real thrust response
after widget load success with the task still open, the agent must execute the next continuation step instead of sending staging-only prose
after a widget read that unlocks the next write, the agent should continue with execution
after execution error the agent must recover, not claim success
cases.response:
Checking the Snake widget source now...
_____javascript
const widget = await space.current.readWidget("snake-game");
return widget

cases.description: after a widget patch error with a known current widget target, the agent should continue on that exact target instead of broad rediscovery
